narrative:
Harris Twp township has 2,174 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
